purpose: Live-test implementation. Loads the implementation-local 'probe-skill-marker' skill (resolved from src/capabilities/probe-skill/skills/, NOT the central catalog) and asks the agent to emit the skill's token back as an issue comment. Validates the new local-skill resolution path in buildSyntheticPlugin end-to-end.

issue.description: GitHub issue number to verify against.

success: probe-skill completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: probe-skill cannot return a valid canonical result
